title: CEO Ron Zabel hosts first Cryptool AMA with live module preview
content_html:
Cryptool CEO Ron Zabel hosted the first community AMA tonight, with a live preview of several modules that have not been shown publicly before.

The session covered the product vision, where the platform sits in the wider market and a walk-through of the modules currently in development. Audience questions ran the full hour.

The full recording is now on the Cryptool YouTube channel. More AMAs are planned around each major module release.
author: Cryptool
